postmark.Subject: Refinance — Patricia Simmons
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refi for Patricia Simmons. Just sending the loan app to start the file — borrower is still gathering NOA, mortgage statement, appraisal. Will forward over the next 1-2 weeks.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jason Mercer
Mercer Mortgage Group
Lic. #M12001505
